projects.title: Customer Churn Predictor
projects.blurb: Gradient-boosted ensemble predicting subscription cancellation 30 days out. Deployed as a FastAPI microservice with SHAP explanations.

projects.title: Real-Time Fraud Detection
projects.blurb: Streaming anomaly detection over 2M+ transactions/day using isolation forests and an autoencoder ensemble on Kafka topics.

projects.title: NLP Review Sentiment Engine
projects.blurb: Fine-tuned DistilBERT on 500k product reviews with aspect-based sentiment extraction. Served behind a GraphQL gateway.

projects.title: Demand Forecasting Suite
projects.blurb: Hierarchical time-series forecasting across 12k SKUs using Prophet + N-BEATS, with backtesting dashboards in Streamlit.

projects.title: Retrieval-Augmented QA Bot
projects.blurb: Hybrid BM25 + dense retrieval over 40k internal docs, re-ranked with a cross-encoder. Citation-grounded answers only.

projects.title: Experimentation Platform
projects.blurb: Bayesian A/B testing framework with sequential analysis, CUPED variance reduction, and auto-generated stakeholder reports.
